3. Impact Assessment

Critical for determining risk classification

Systems that affect individuals (employment, credit, healthcare, etc.) are typically higher risk

Critical for high-risk classification

4. Additional Infomration of AI usage

Systems that may use some of the following features

Social scoring by public authorities is prohibited

Typically prohibited except for specific law enforcement purposes
